key.name: tracker-shape
key.description: Sets the shape or cursor to be used as the tracker shape.

key.name: tracker-size
key.description: Sets the size of the tracker element in pixels.

key.name: tracker-color
key.description: Sets the color of the tracker.

key.name: tracker-click-visibility
key.description: Controls when click feedback is shown: never, only click feedback, or as well as the tracker.

key.name: tracker-click-color
key.description: Sets the color used for click feedback.

key.name: tracker-click-duration
key.description: Sets the duration of click feedback in milliseconds.

key.name: tracker-opacity
key.description: Sets the opacity of the tracker from 0 (transparent) to 100 (opaque).

key.name: tracker-idle-fade-active
key.description: Sets the active state of the tracker.

key.name: tracker-idle-fade-timeout
key.summary: Inactivity timeout before the tracker fades out
key.description: Sets the inactivity timeout, after which the tracker starts fading out. (0 for infinity)

key.name: tracker-idle-fade-duration
key.summary: Fade out transition duration of the tracker
key.description: Sets the transition duration that it takes the tracker to fade out.

key.name: tracker-active
key.description: Sets the active state of the tracker.

key.name: tracker-always-on-screen-sharing
key.summary: Always show the tracker while screen sharing (only on Wayland)
key.description: Determines whether the tracker should always be shown while screen sharing. (This feature is only available on Wayland.)

key.name: tracker-always-on-screen-recording
key.summary: Always show the tracker while screen recording
key.description: Determines whether the tracker should always be shown while screen recording.

key.name: tracker-keybinding
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut for toggling the tracker
key.description: Sets the keyboard shortcut that toggles the tracker.
